movie.synopsis: Main Haan (2026) Inspired by true events from 2007, Main Haan follows Seerat, a young woman haunted by an unseen presence after moving to Delhi. As terrifying incidents escalate, a shocking truth emerges—a restless spirit is using her to reveal an unfinished story connected to Sarab, the man she loves.
